steps.title: Identify the key relationship
steps.content: Nazareth believes Elvis is an anthology, and he named his course “Elvis as Anthology.” The key signal is that the course title directly reflects the stated belief—it's a concrete expression of his conceptual understanding.

steps.title: Choose the transition showing purpose
steps.content: ”To that end” means “for that purpose”—it indicates the course naming is meant to serve the anthology concept. In sum, That is, and In addition treat the title as a summary, restatement, or unrelated addition rather than showing it serves the stated belief. That matches choice A — A is correct.
